params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: Cycle 95 R-2: mistral_trpc_json_v4 verify. Major rewrite: switched from SSE format to tRPC batch JSON (the actual format newChat returns per #594 capture). Path stays '/'. Content-Type application/json. Body = [{result:{data:{json:{chatId, messages:[assistant]}}}}] with 22-field message obj including contentChunks[0].text containing warning + meta.values for SuperJSON Date/UUID type tags.

devtools_check_instructions: 4. Network /api/trpc/message.newChat?batch=1 → Response → confirm our tRPC JSON envelope (single array element with chatId + messages)
5. SUCCESS: warning text rendered in chat bubble
6. PARTIAL: envelope delivered but Error 6002 → schema field gaps

notes: Cycle 95 R-2 mistral v4 tRPC batch JSON envelope verify.
